titleStmt.title: SII 22.26: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 26. (A.R. No. 26 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJA I—16th YEAR, (A.D. 1000-1)

summary.p: The details of date given viz. Mithuna, śu. 5, Thursday, Aśvati would give the probable equivalent A.D. 1001, May 29, f.d.t. 17. The nakshatra was however Āślēsha, ·80, and not Aśvati. The record is incomplete. It seems to register a sale of land by the Sabhā of “Paḍai-ēviya” Kaḍavūr in Ambar-nāḍu to a certain [Śe]mbiyaṉ-Aḍigaḷ-Chaturvēdibhaṭṭaṉ of the same village. Mention is also made of another person by name Bāradāyaṉ-Aḍigaḷ-Chaturvēdibhaṭṭaṉ who is stated to have been sent to Malai-nāḍu by Rājarājamārāyar (evidently the king) on some mission.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kā
n=tannūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭum mpapāṭiyum taṭikai pāṭiyum kuṭa
malaināṭum(ṅ) kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum ti ṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻiu
ḷ ḷellā yāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai tecukoḷ śrīko[virājarāja]kesaripanma
ṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu mithuṉanāyaṟṟu Avvāṇṭa mparnāṭṭu paṭaieviya kaṭavūr sabhai nāyaṟṟu muṟpa
kkattu pakal pañcamiyum vyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināṟ caturat lile puḷḷivācittu kūṭṭak kuṟai
vaṟa kūṭiiruntu paṇittu vaitta nilam viṟṟa sabhai vilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr pāratāyaṉ Aṭikaḷ caturvvetipaṭṭa
ṉai Irājarājamārāyar malaināṭṭukku yokattaḷam poyvanta Ivvūr cempiyaṉ Aṭikaḷ caturvvetipaṭṭaṉ kaṭava
ṉāṉa poṉṉukku Ivaṉ Āḷkkoṇṭi makaṉ kuṭiyoṭuThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.26 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
